# DM Electricals & Installation

> Licensed electrical contractor in Nairobi, Kenya — installations, CCTV, electric fence, fire & alarm systems, emergency repairs, and electrical products. Based on Mwihoko Road, Kasarani.

DM Electricals serves homes, businesses, and industrial clients across Nairobi with ERC-aligned work, transparent pricing, and 24/7 emergency response. This site is a single-page overview of services, products, projects, process, reviews, and contact options.

**Primary location:** Mwihoko Road, Kasarani, Nairobi, Kenya  
**Service area:** Greater Nairobi and surrounding areas  
**Phones:** +254 799 762 232 | +254 762 748 694 (Kenya)

## Site pages

- [Home / full site](https://ryanallanx4.github.io/dmelectricals/): Complete HTML page — services, products catalogue, projects, testimonials, contact form, WhatsApp.

## Machine-readable summary

- [Plain summary (Markdown)](https://ryanallanx4.github.io/dmelectricals/index.html.md): Same information in compact Markdown for LLM context.
